Conceptually, this type is relevant when we switch from downloading the full payload to only sampling it. We haven't strictly defined exactly when we plan to make the switch (afaik).

From your message, I suspect you expect that switch to take place at the mandatory proofs hard fork? If we have a consensus that the switch will take place at the mandatory proofs hard fork, then I agree with you.
